abilities.name: Scatterblast
abilities.description: Unloads a blast that damages and applies a movement speed slow to enemy units within a cone. The blast is more effective at point-blank distance. Cast Range: 800. Damage: 100/160/220/280 (170/230/290/350). Point-Blank Damage Factor: 1.5. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Attack Speed Slow: 100. Slow Duration: 1. Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 85/90/95/100.

abilities.name: Firesnap Cookie
abilities.description: Beatrix feeds a potent cookie to an allied unit, causing it to hop a short distance (425 units). The affected unit stuns and damages enemy units within the landing radius (300 units) for 75/150/225/300 damage over 1/1.4/1.8/2.2 seconds. It then heals itself for 200 health and launches a singular, less potent Mortimer Kisses firespit to the landing destination. Cast Range: 650. Cooldown: 18/17/16/15 seconds. Mana Cost: 105.

abilities.name: Lil' Shredder
abilities.description: Rapidly fires a number of fixed-damage attacks from her mounted turret while applying armor reduction to the affected enemy unit. Grants self bonus attack range for the duration. Number of Attacks: 5 (7). Attack Range Bonus: 160/240/320/400. Attack Speed Bonus: 300. Base Attack Time: 1. Set Attack Damage: 20/35/50/65. Armor Reduction per Attack: 0.5. Cooldown: 24/20/16/12. Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Gobble Up
abilities.description: Mortimer gobbles up an allied unit, which he can then spit toward enemy units. The unit stays in his belly for a fixed duration of 3 seconds and is released if Spit Out is not cast within this time. Cast Range: 150, Cooldown: 40, Mana Cost: 120.

abilities.name: Mortimer Kisses
abilities.description: Launches a barrage of firespit globs over time while reducing Snapfire's turn rate for the duration. Each glob causes impact damage and creates pools of firespit that apply a movement speed slow and damage over time. Cast Range: 3000, Impact Radius: 275, Cooldown: 120/110/100, Mana Cost: 125/150/175.
